messages.content: ugh my back is killing me, turning 41 next month and my body is letting me know lol

Ha, the body does have a way of sending those little birthday reminders! 😄

What's going on with your back - is it something specific like you overdid it with something, or more of that general "I just exist and now things hurt" situation?
spent the whole weekend assembling furniture for my daughter's dorm, she starts college in the fall

Oh that's a big milestone! Your daughter heading off to college - that's exciting and probably a little bittersweet at the same time?

And yeah, hours of furniture assembly will absolutely wreck your back. All that hunching over instruction manuals, twisting around on the floor... it's brutal even for younger folks. Your back basically sent you an invoice for the weekend lol.

How are you feeling about her heading off? Is it coming up fast or do you still have a bit of time?
my wife keeps telling me to stretch first and i keep not listening, classic

Ha, the classic "I know she's right but I'm not going to admit it until I'm hobbling around" move 😄 

To be fair, who actually stretches before assembling furniture? Like you're not exactly thinking "better warm up, I've got a KALLAX to build." But your wife is collecting evidence for a very strong "I told you so" case right now.

Are you at least doing some stretching now to recover, or are you fully committed to the stubbornness? 😄
anyway we're doing a little anniversary dinner friday, 15 years. trying to pick somewhere decent downtown

15 years, that's awesome - congrats! And a nice dinner out while your daughter is still home but almost gone... good timing to celebrate together.

What kind of food are you two into? And are you thinking more cozy and intimate or a livelier kind of place? I can try to help you think through it even though I don't know your city - sometimes just talking through what you're in the mood for helps narrow it down.
